threats.name: Missing X-Frame-Options
threats.desc: Clickjacking attacks possible without this header.

threats.name: Missing CSP Header
threats.desc: No Content-Security-Policy header. XSS attacks enabled.

threats.name: Missing HSTS
threats.desc: No HSTS header. HTTP downgrade attacks possible.
